explanation: This command uses the Set-Service cmdlet with the -SecurityDescriptorSddl flag to modify a service's DACL, matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria. It is a valid test command for evaluating the rule.
This command uses the short form '-sd' instead of '-SecurityDescriptorSddl', which is an equivalent substitution technique. It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command reorders the arguments to the Set-Service cmdlet. The order of parameters is changed, but the behavior remains the same and still matches the Sigma rule.
This command uses quotes around the command line to simulate different parsing behavior while still matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
